title: Financial Data
subtitle: Explore national indicators and track quarterly balance sheets of financial institutions with updated and accurate data.

dataSources.title: Sources and methodology
dataSources.description: We collect indicators from official Brazilian open data sources via their public APIs and services. Values are normalized to consistent units and reference periods.
dataSources.methodology: Some series are derived from the base data (e.g., YTD and rolling 12-month rates, and trade balance = exports - imports).

sidra.label: IBGE/SIDRA API
sidra.description: Inflation, labor, and income series from SIDRA.

sgs.label: BCB/SGS (BCData/SGS)
sgs.description: Time series for interest, external, and fiscal indicators (JSON service).

comex.label: Comex Stat (MDIC/SECEX)
comex.description: Open data base used for trade balance (exports - imports).

ipea.label: Ipeadata (IPEA) OData API
ipea.description: Macroeconomic series, including IGP indices (FGV) and GDP (IBGE).

dataSources.openDataDescription: Each source publishes its own open data terms and licenses.
dataSources.disclaimer: Sources and methodologies are maintained by their respective institutions and may change without notice.

IPCA.label: IPCA
IPCA.description: Broad National Consumer Price Index. It is Brazil's official inflation and the main reference for the inflation target.

IPCA_15.label: IPCA-15
IPCA_15.description: IPCA Preview (Broad National Consumer Price Index 15). Anticipation of the official inflation trend for the month.

INPC.label: INPC
INPC.description: National Consumer Price Index. Measures inflation for lower-income families and is used in salary adjustments.

IGP_M.label: IGP-M
IGP_M.description: General Market Price Index. Measures price variation in the economy (wholesale, consumer, and construction) and is common in rental contracts.

IGP_DI.label: IGP-DI
IGP_DI.description: General Price Index – Internal Availability. Tracks inflation at different stages of the economy for macroeconomic analysis.

SELIC.label: Selic Rate
SELIC.description: Special System for Settlement and Custody. It is the economy's basic interest rate, used to control inflation and guide credit costs.

CDI.label: CDI
CDI.description: Interbank Deposit Certificate. Reference rate for very short-term interbank operations, the basis for many investments.

DI_OVER.label: DI Over
DI_OVER.description: Average daily rate of Interfinancial Deposits (overnight). Indicates the cost of money between banks in the very short term.

TR.label: Referential Rate
TR.description: Mainly used as a monetary correction rate. It serves to update savings balances, FGTS, capitalization bonds and calculate the cost of certain real estate financing (SFH system).

GDP.label: GDP
GDP.description: Gross Domestic Product. Sum of final goods and services produced in the country, main measure of economic activity.

UNEMPLOYMENT.label: Unemployment Rate
UNEMPLOYMENT.description: Percentage of the workforce that is unemployed and looking for work. Measures the degree of slack in the labor market.

AVERAGE_INCOME.label: Average Real Income
AVERAGE_INCOME.description: Average labor income adjusted for inflation. Shows the purchasing power of the employed population.

TRADE_BALANCE.label: Trade Balance
TRADE_BALANCE.description: Difference between exports and imports of goods. Indicates if the country sells more abroad than it buys.

CURRENT_ACCOUNT.label: Current Account
CURRENT_ACCOUNT.description: Balance of transactions with the exterior in goods, services, income, and transfers. Shows external financing needs or capacity.

INTERNATIONAL_RESERVES.label: International Reserves
INTERNATIONAL_RESERVES.description: Foreign currency assets held by the Central Bank. Serve to reduce external vulnerability and provide exchange rate stability.

PUBLIC_DEBT_GDP.label: Net Public Debt (% GDP)
PUBLIC_DEBT_GDP.description: Relation between net public debt and GDP. Evaluates fiscal sustainability in the medium and long term.

PRIMARY_RESULT.label: Primary Result
PRIMARY_RESULT.description: Difference between government revenues and expenses, without considering debt interest. Indicates current fiscal effort.

financialInstitutions.title: Financial Institutions
financialInstitutions.description: Consolidated quarterly balance sheets and credit ratings under BACEN supervision.

nationalIndicators.title: National Indicators
nationalIndicators.description: Historical series of IPCA, IGP-M, INPC and macroeconomic projections.
